chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA C.P.No.D-185 of 2019 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objections at flag "A". 2. For orders on maintainability of main case. ------ 21.05.2025 Petitioner, present in person. Mr. Liaquat Ali Shar, Additional Advocate General, Sindh a/w Kashif Raza, Municipal Officer, Municipal Corporation, Larkano. ------ The Municipal Officer, present in the Court submits that all the dues have been cleared; however, he undertakes to submit certain documents in support of his claim. On the other hand, petitioner present in person affirms the statement and therefore seeks disposal of the petition, which too is not opposed by the learned Additional Advocate General, Sindh. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Manzoor
